meaning: n.中产阶级,商人,资产阶级adj.中产阶级的,平庸的n.九点活字
examples: He had a petit bourgeois mentality.
He thought they might infect others with their bourgeois ideas.
These are two sons of the upper bourgeois who feel degraded by the mendacity and hypocrisy of the world they see around them.
In his eyes, I was a sheltered bourgeois adolescent who went horseback riding in the country.
By the time he became a lawyer, in his fifties, he was a respectable bourgeois townsman.
